description_long: This is a dark blue commercial jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and swept-back wings featuring orange-tipped wingtips. The aircraft has two rear-mounted turbofan engines positioned on either side of the tail section, and a prominent T-tail configuration with a horizontal stabilizer mounted atop the vertical fin. The cockpit is located at the very front of the fuselage, with a multi-window canopy for pilot visibility. The landing gear is visible and appears to be a tricycle configuration, with a single nose wheel and two main gear units under the wings. The airplane's surface is smooth and metallic, with visible markings and insignia on the wings and tail.
description: A dark blue commercial jet with swept-back wings, rear-mounted engines, and a T-tail, featuring orange-tipped wingtips and a forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, and the full wingspan with orange-tipped wingtips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, rear-mounted engines, and T-tail configuration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engines, T-tail, and the symmetry of the wings and tail surfaces.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the fuselage, wing, and tail details from the opposite side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with slight dihedral and orange-tipped wingtips.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with one nose gear and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and multiple windows.
